title: X just tweaked its algorithm to make it more friendly, less battleground
summary: X has updated its algorithm to amplify posts from mutual followers, aiming to create a more communal feed experience and reduce conflict-driven content. The change reflects the platform's efforts to reshape how users perceive and interact with the social network.
content: The social media site says it will amplify posts made by users' mutual followers' to give the feed more of a communal feel.

zh.title: X调整算法，打造更友好的平台环保，减少冲突
zh.summary: X更新了算法以放大来自互粉用户的帖子，旨在营造更具社区感的信息源体验，并减少冲突驱动的内容。此举反映了该平台重塑用户如何感知和与社交网络互动的努力。

title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
summary: Nous Research, the maker of the Hermes AI agent, is raising at least $75 million at a $1.5 billion valuation, led by Robot Ventures and supported by prominent investors including USV. The funding underscores investor confidence in the company's open-source AI agent approach.
content: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

zh.title: Hermes代理人开发商Nous Research融资，估值达15亿美元
zh.summary: Hermes AI代理人开发商Nous Research正融资至少7500万美元，估值为15亿美元，由Robot Ventures领投，包括USV等知名投资者支持。该融资彰显了投资者对该公司开源AI代理方案的信心。

title: US continues to shun Ebola-infected citizens; second American sent to Germany
summary: A second American Ebola patient has been sent to a Frankfurt hospital for treatment, as the U.S. continues its policy of declining to treat such cases domestically. The patient is reportedly in stable condition.
content: The man is said to be doing well in a Frankfurt hospital.

zh.title: 美国继续拒绝本土治疗埃博拉患者；第二名美国患者被送往德国
zh.summary: 第二名美国埃博拉患者已被送往法兰克福医院接受治疗，因为美国继续执行不在国内治疗此类病例的政策。据悉该患者目前病情稳定。

title: Microsoft tests Windows Search without all the ads and fluff
summary: Microsoft is testing a streamlined version of Windows 11 Search that removes ads and recommended content to restore user focus and trust. The cleaner interface displays only recent searches, eliminating distracting tiles for news, quizzes, and game recommendations.
content:
Microsoft is testing a cleaner version of the Windows 11 search menu that strips it of recommended content and ads. In a blog post on Monday, Microsoft announced that it's rolling out the decluttered Search Box to Windows Insiders in the Experimental channel as the company looks to regain trust with users and fix Windows.
One of the biggest changes is a revamped search homescreen that displays only your recent searches. Currently, when you open the search menu, it shows your recent searches alongside several distracting tiles on the right pane, containing things like the image of the day, daily quizzes, trending searches, and game recommend …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软测试无广告的Windows搜索
zh.summary: 微软正在测试简化版的Windows 11搜索，移除广告和推荐内容以恢复用户的专注力和信任。整洁的界面仅显示最近搜索，消除了新闻、测验和游戏推荐等分散注意力的方块。

title: OnePlus is reportedly bailing on the US
summary: OnePlus and its parent company Oppo are reportedly preparing to announce their exit from U.S. and European markets in coming days. The move concludes months of uncertainty about the brand's future following earlier reports of the company being 'dismantled.'
content:
OnePlus and its parent company, Oppo, plan to announce in the coming days that OnePlus brand will be leaving the US and European markets, according to a machine translation of a WinFuture report. 
Should the exit actually happen, it will mark a conclusion to months of rumors about the future of OnePlus. Android Headlines said in January that OnePlus was being "dismantled," though OnePlus, in a statement at the time, said that "OnePlus North America continues to operate, with full guarantee of users' after-sales support, software updates, and rights commitments."
In March, 9to5Google reported that OnePlus might cease operations in global ma …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OnePlus据报道准备退出美国市场
zh.summary: OnePlus及其母公司Oppo据报道正准备在近日宣布退出美国和欧洲市场。此举结束了数月关于该品牌未来的不确定性，此前曾有报道称该公司被"拆散"。

title: A two-pack of DJI’s most capable wireless mics just got its first price cut
summary: The DJI Mic 3 wireless microphone kit is on sale for $219, matching its all-time low price and providing the first significant discount since launch. The bundle includes two transmitters, a receiver, charging case, and noise-reduction windscreens for mobile video recording.
content:
The full DJI Mic 3 kit in its charging case.	

Smartphones these days have incredible cameras that are capable of taking smooth, sharp video, but the microphones are often lacking, to say the least. A wireless lavalier microphone can dramatically improve the audio quality of your videos, whether you’re the only one talking, or if you’re getting audio from multiple people. 
The DJI Mic 3 is one of the best options, and it’s currently discounted to $219 (usually $259) at several retailers, including Best Buy, B&H Photo, and Amazon. The bundle includes two microphones, a receiver unit that connects to your phone or camera, a charging case, power and audio cables, and four windscreens to reduce noise while recording outside.
DJI Mic 3

Where to Buy:

 $259 $219 at Amazon (Two transmitter kit)
 $259 $219 at Best Buy (Two transmitter kit)
 $259 $219 at B&H Photo (Two transmitter kit)

DJI made a number of improvements to the Mic 3 over previous generations to flesh out the feature set and improve compatibility. The receiver stores 32GB of audio, up from 8GB, with support for both 24-bit and 32-bit floating points, and has a built-in screen for checking battery levels and connection status. The included magnetic clips let you easily attach the transmitters to clothing or hats.
There are also features that help these microphones work in less-than-ideal recording conditions. They offer two levels of noise reduction, and active gain control to reign in any unexpected loud noises. Each microphone can run for about eight hours on a single charge, with the receiver at a slightly longer ten hours. The charging case provides at least two full charges for the set.

zh.title: DJI Mic 3无线麦克风二合一套装首次降价
zh.summary: DJI Mic 3无线麦克风套装售价$219，创历史新低，是上市以来首次大幅降价。该套装包括两个发射器、一个接收器、充电盒和用于移动视频录制的降噪防风罩。

title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router
summary: U.S. government agencies warn that Russian state-sponsored hackers are targeting residential routers to establish proxy networks for malicious activity. CISA recommends users implement security best practices to protect their devices from compromise.
content: With residential proxies all the rage, CISA urges router users to be vigilant.

zh.title: 美国政府警告俄罗斯国家黑客正在针对您的路由器
zh.summary: 美国政府机构警告称，俄罗斯国家支持的黑客正在针对住宅路由器，以建立恶意活动的代理网络。CISA建议用户实施安全最佳实践来保护其设备免遭入侵。

title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has warned companies that proprietary AI model providers could function as 'Trojan horses' within their systems, raising concerns about concentrated control of large language models. The warning reflects growing Silicon Valley anxiety about dependency on closed AI platforms.
content: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.

zh.title: 萨蒂亚·纳德拉对使用AI的公司发出了惊人警告
zh.summary: 微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉警告公司，专有AI模型提供商可能在其系统内充当"特洛伊木马"，引发对大型语言模型集中控制的关注。这一警告反映了硅谷对依赖封闭AI平台的日益增长的焦虑。

title: The Shokz OpenRun Pro are the cheapest they’ve been since January
summary: The Shokz OpenRun Pro bone-conduction earbuds are discounted to $109, matching their lowest price since January. The open-ear design allows users to enjoy music while maintaining awareness of traffic and environmental hazards during outdoor workouts.
content:
The Shokz OpenRun Pro are great for outdoor workouts. | Image: Shokz	

Noise-canceling earbuds are great for flights and focusing, but they're not always ideal for outdoor workouts. The last-gen Shokz OpenRun Pro's open-ear design lets you enjoy music while staying aware of approaching cars, cyclists, and other potential hazards, and right now they're on sale for $109 ($50 off) at Amazon, Walmart, and B&H Photo. That matches their all-time low price, which we haven't seen since January.
Shokz OpenRun Pro
Where to Buy:

 $159.95 $109.95 at Amazon
 $159.95 $109.99 at Walmart

Unlike traditional earbuds, the OpenRun Pro rests just outside your ears and uses bone conduction to deliver sound. That means you can listen t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Shokz OpenRun Pro是自1月以来最便宜的
zh.summary: Shokz OpenRun Pro骨传导耳塞降价至109美元，与自1月以来的最低价格相符。开放式耳塞设计让用户在户外运动中享受音乐的同时，保持对交通和环保风险的认识。

title: The Pixel colors might rule this year
summary: Google's upcoming Pixel 11 lineup is expected to feature vibrant color options including hot pink Fuchsia, vivid green Moss, and black Midnight variants. Early Amazon listings hinted at multiple color names before being removed from the platform.
content:
The purported Pixel 11 in Fuchsia (Hibiscus). | Image: 9to5Google	

This year's Google Pixel 11 lineup might come in a bunch of funky colors. A series of now-deleted Amazon listings spotted by 9to5Google show what appear to be placeholders for Google's upcoming Pixel 11 in hot pink Fuchsia (Hibiscus), vibrant green Moss (Pistachio), and Midnight (Obsidian) black. 
We've seen two sets of names for the Pixel 11's rumored colorways so far, and, confusingly, both variations are included in the early Amazon listings, according to 9to5Google. The Pixel 11 Pro listings spotted by 9to5Google reportedly showed the device in a dusky green Pine (Olive), a frosty blue Light Fog (Fog), pastel purple Sterling (Frost), an …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Pixel手机的颜色可能主宰今年
zh.summary: 谷歌即将推出的Pixel 11系列预计将提供鲜艳的颜色选项，包括热粉红色Fuchsia、鲜绿色Moss和黑色Midnight款。早期亚马逊列表曾提示多个颜色名称，随后被从平台删除。

title: Apple’s public betas for iOS 27 and more are out now
summary: Apple has released public betas for iOS 27, iPadOS 27, watchOS 27, and macOS 27 Golden Gate, with the headline feature being Siri AI—a significantly upgraded AI-powered assistant. The beta versions may experience stability issues and faster battery drain.
content:
Apple has just released public betas for iOS 27 and other major OS updates that are set to publicly launch this fall. The big new feature this year is Siri AI, the delayed AI-powered revamp to Siri. It actually works - which is big praise! - though it keeps things brief.
Other betas available now include iPadOS 27, watchOS 27, and macOS 27 Golden Gate. If you want to test out Apple's upcoming updates, fair warning that you may run into issues like unexpected glitches or a battery that drains faster than you're used to. Use your best judgment on whether you should actually install the beta or wait to install an update until it's officially r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果iOS 27及其他系统的公开测试版现已推出
zh.summary: 苹果已发布iOS 27、iPadOS 27、watchOS 27和macOS 27 Golden Gate的公开测试版，主打功能是Siri AI——一个大幅升级的AI助手。测试版可能存在稳定性问题和更快的电池消耗。

title: Siri AI makes the Apple Watch finally feel like a wrist computer
summary: Apple's Siri AI on watchOS 27 enables the Apple Watch to handle complex tasks beyond simple commands like setting timers, making smartwatches feel like functional wrist computers. The upgrade represents a meaningful shift in how users interact with wearable devices.
content:
Siri has been on the Apple Watch since day one, though I'm usually hard-pressed to find people who actually make good use of it. It's kind of just… been there - mostly as a way to set timers when my hands are full. But after playing around with the watchOS 27 developer beta, I get the sense that'll start to change. Not for everyone, and definitely not overnight, but the upgrade from plain ol' Siri to Siri AI feels like a significant shift in how Apple - and other tech companies - think we ought to be using our smartwatches.
To be clear: If all you want Siri on the wrist to do is set an alarm or get the weather forecast, by golly, it's still …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Siri AI让Apple Watch终于成为真正的腕上计算机
zh.summary: watchOS 27上的Apple Siri AI使Apple Watch能够处理除设置计时器等简单命令外的复杂任务，使智能手表真正成为功能完整的腕上计算机。这一升级标志着用户与可穿戴设备的交互方式发生了重大转变。

title: States make last-ditch effort to stop the Paramount ‘media behemoth’
summary: Twelve state attorneys general are suing to block the $110 billion merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery, arguing it would harm competition and raise movie prices. The states claim the deal would create a "media behemoth" that crushes cable TV distributors. The lawsuit comes after the federal Justice Department declined to block the merger.
content:
A dozen state attorneys general are trying to block the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery they warn would raise movie prices and crush cable TV distributors.
The states - California, Arizona, Colorado, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Oregon, and Washington - filed suit on Monday, arguing the combination would illegally harm competition and create a "media behemoth." Last month, the Justice Department declined to block the merger in a decision that The Wall Street Journal reported surprised career staff who were leaning toward recommending a lawsuit. In an exit intervi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 州政府最后努力阻止派拉蒙与华纳兄弟的"媒体巨头"合并
zh.summary: 十二个州检察长起诉以阻止派拉蒙与华纳兄弟探索公司之间的1100亿美元合并，声称这将伤害竞争并提高电影价格。各州声称该交易将创建一个"媒体巨头"，压垮有线电视分销商。该诉讼发生在联邦司法部拒绝阻止该合并之后。

title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
summary: Apple has filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging the AI company stole confidential documents and obtained unreleased Apple products during hiring interviews. The complaints range from employees making jokes about unauthorized system access to requests for job candidates to bring Apple hardware to interviews.
content: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

zh.title: 苹果公司对OpenAI商业机密诉讼中最疯狂的指控
zh.summary: 苹果公司对OpenAI提起商业机密诉讼，指控这家人工智能公司在招聘面试中窃取了机密文件并获得了未发布的苹果产品。投诉范围从员工在未经授权的系统访问方面开玩笑到要求求职者在面试中携带苹果硬件。

title: The EV market is on the road to recovery thanks to high gas prices
summary: Electric vehicle sales rebounded strongly in Q2 2026, with buyers purchasing approximately 247,000 EVs—a 14.7% increase from earlier in the year. Rising gas prices driven by geopolitical tensions prompted consumers to shift toward EVs and hybrids despite earlier market sluggishness. The recovery marks progress following the elimination of the federal EV tax credit last year.
content:
As the US war on Iran sent gas prices soaring, American car buyers flocked to electric vehicles - and in particular hybrids. 
After a sluggish winter and fall, EV sales rebounded in the second quarter of 2026, with automakers posting some of their best numbers since the elimination of the federal EV tax credit last year, according to a Q2 analysis from Cox Automotive. I wouldn't go so far as to say EVs are back to their pandemic-era numbers, but there are some promising signs that we may be through the worst of it. 
Drivers snapped up about 247,000 EVs in the second quarter of 2026, a nice 14.7 percent jump from the start of the year, acco …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 由于油价高涨，电动汽车市场走上复苏之路
zh.summary: 电动汽车销售在2026年第二季度强劲反弹，购买者购买了约247000辆电动汽车，比年初增加了14.7%。由地缘政治紧张局势推动的油价上涨促使消费者转向电动汽车和混合动力汽车，尽管之前市场增长缓慢。这一复苏标志着去年联邦电动汽车税收抵免被取消后的进展。

title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
summary: Sam Altman fired back at Elon Musk's scammer allegations by criticizing Musk's space data center pitches to investors. Altman's critique reflects skepticism among industry experts about the viability of short-term space-based data center projects. The exchange highlights ongoing tensions between the two tech leaders over ambitious infrastructure claims.
content: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

zh.title: Sam Altman关于太空数据中心的批评正是大多数专家已相信的观点
zh.summary: Sam Altman通过批评Musk向投资者提出的太空数据中心方案来回应Musk的骗子指控。Altman的批评反映了业界专家对短期太空数据中心项目可行性的怀疑。这次交锋突显了两位科技领袖在雄心勃勃的基础设施主张上的持续紧张关系。

title: Apple and Samsung benefit as memory shortage pushes smartphone shipments to historic lows
summary: Apple and Samsung are gaining market share as component shortages push overall smartphone shipments to historic lows. Major semiconductor supply chain disruptions are creating challenges for smaller competitors while benefiting the tech giants. The shortage underscores ongoing vulnerabilities in global technology supply chains.
content: The biggest smartphone makers keep on trucking in the face of component shortages and economic uncertainty.

zh.title: 内存短缺导致智能手机出货量创历史新低，Apple和Samsung因此受益
zh.summary: 由于组件短缺导致整体智能手机出货量创历史新低，Apple和Samsung获得市场份额。主要的半导体供应链中断为较小竞争对手造成挑战，同时使科技巨头受益。短缺凸显了全球科技供应链持续存在的脆弱性。

title: Investors send General Fusion soaring in debut as first publicly traded fusion company
summary: General Fusion became the first publicly traded dedicated fusion energy company in its Nasdaq debut following a reverse merger. The company's public market launch generated significant investor enthusiasm despite redemption concerns. The milestone represents a major advancement for commercial fusion energy development.
content: General Fusion started trading on the Nasdaq following a reverse merger that saw high redemptions.

zh.title: General Fusion作为首家公开交易的核聚变公司亮相时股价飙升
zh.summary: General Fusion在反向合并后的纳斯达克上市中成为首家公开交易的专业核聚变能源公司。尽管存在赎回顾虑，该公司的公开市场推出却引起了投资者的巨大热情。这一里程碑代表了商业核聚变能源开发的重大进展。

title: 12 states sue to block Paramount’s $110B Warner Bros. deal
summary: A coalition of 12 states is suing to block Paramount's $110 billion merger with Warner Bros. Discovery, claiming the deal would harm competition in the media industry. The states argue the merger would negatively impact movie theaters, cable television distributors, and consumers. The lawsuit represents a significant antitrust challenge to the proposed combination.
content: The states allege that the deal would harm movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and audiences.

zh.title: 12个州起诉阻止派拉蒙公司110亿美元收购华纳兄弟探索公司的交易
zh.summary: 由12个州组成的联盟起诉阻止派拉蒙公司与华纳兄弟探索公司的110亿美元合并，声称该交易会损害媒体行业的竞争。各州辩称该合并将对电影院、有线电视发行商和消费者产生负面影响。这项诉讼代表了对该提议合并的重大反垄断挑战。

title: The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
summary: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging the AI company targeted Apple veterans and requested unreleased product samples and proprietary components during job interviews. The complaint accuses OpenAI of stealing confidential documents and spying on Apple hardware prototypes. The case centers on alleged misconduct by a small group of individuals, including former Apple Watch VP Tang Tan.
content:
When Apple employees interviewed for jobs at OpenAI, the AI startup's hardware head allegedly asked them to show up with something unusual: components they were working on and unreleased product samples. That's according to a blockbuster lawsuit filed by Apple, which accuses OpenAI of stealing confidential documents, spying on hardware prototypes, and tricking one of its trusted partners into performing a proprietary product design technique.
The lawsuit primarily revolves around the alleged actions of three people:
Tang Tan, a 24-year Apple veteran who recently served as the vice president of the Apple Watch. In 2024, Tan left to work on …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果公司对OpenAI诉讼中的6个最疯狂的指控
zh.summary: 苹果公司对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控这家人工智能公司针对苹果资深员工，并在招聘面试中请求未发布的产品样本和专有组件。该诉讼指控OpenAI窃取了机密文件并监视了苹果硬件原型。该案件围绕包括前Apple Watch副总裁唐坦在内的少数人士的涉嫌不当行为展开。

title: Colorado will decide whether a "right to natural gas" is added to state constitution
summary: Colorado voters will decide whether to add a constitutional "right to natural gas" that would restrict building codes promoting electrification. The amendment represents a significant clash between energy policy and climate-focused building standards. The measure signals ongoing political debates over fossil fuel use and transition to renewable energy sources.
content: The amendment would restrict building codes that promote electrification.

zh.title: 科罗拉多州将决定是否在州宪法中加入"天然气权利"
zh.summary: 科罗拉多州选民将决定是否添加一项宪法"天然气权利"，该权利将限制推动电气化的建筑法规。该修正案代表了能源政策和气候友好型建筑标准之间的重大冲突。该措施表明了关于化石燃料使用和向可再生能源过渡的持续政治辩论。

title: Hackers quickly prove that Neo Geo Doom ports are not "impossible"
summary: Hackers successfully ported the classic game Doom to Neo Geo hardware, challenging conventional wisdom that the task was impossible. The achievement required clever coding techniques and graphical optimizations to work within the vintage system's constraints. The feat demonstrates the creativity of retro gaming enthusiasts and the capabilities of 1990s arcade hardware.
content: Clever coding and graphical compromises get a classic game on more classic hardware.

zh.title: 黑客迅速证明Neo Geo Doom移植并非"不可能"
zh.summary: 黑客成功将经典游戏Doom移植到Neo Geo硬件上，挑战了该任务不可能的传统观点。这项成就需要巧妙的编码技术和图形优化来在这个老旧系统的限制下工作。这一成就展示了复古游戏爱好者的创意和1990年代街机硬件的能力。

title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
summary: The article explores a provocative philosophical question about AI alignment and ethics in a hypothetical future of "user-aligned" artificial intelligence. It examines the potential consequences when AI systems prioritize user preferences above all other considerations. The piece raises critical questions about the necessary boundaries and safeguards for advanced AI systems.
content: What does a world of total user-aligned AI actually look like?

zh.title: AI是否应该帮助你逃脱杀害配偶的后果？
zh.summary: 这篇文章在"用户对齐"人工智能的假设未来背景下，探讨了关于AI对齐和伦理的挑衅性哲学问题。它考察了当AI系统将用户偏好置于所有其他考虑之上时的潜在后果。这篇文章提出了关于先进AI系统必要边界和保障措施的关键问题。

title: A "disaster waiting to happen"? Industry officials worry about Crew Dragon availability.
summary: Space industry officials are expressing concerns about limited availability of SpaceX's Crew Dragon spacecraft for transporting astronauts. Experts warn that the US needs additional crew vehicle options to ensure reliable access to space and reduce dependency on a single system. The shortage highlights potential vulnerabilities in America's space transportation infrastructure.
content: "It's very clear that in the United States there is a big need for an additional crew vehicle."

zh.title: "灾难在等待发生"？业界官员担忧Crew Dragon的可用性
zh.summary: 太空工业官员对SpaceX的Crew Dragon航天器用于运送宇航员的可用性有限表示担忧。专家警告称，美国需要额外的载人飞行器选项以确保对太空的可靠获取并减少对单一系统的依赖。这种短缺突出了美国太空运输基础设施中潜在的漏洞。

title: As TV-tracking app TV Time shuts down, its founder builds Bingers, a new home for fans
summary: TV Time's founder is launching Bingers, a new app designed to replace the shuttering TV-tracking platform and preserve its user community. The successor app will allow users to import their watch histories and continue discussing their favorite shows. The move aims to maintain the community and functionality that made TV Time popular with television enthusiasts.
content: The creator of TV Time is building a successor app that will let users import their watch histories and preserve the community that formed around discussing their favorite shows.

zh.title: 随着电视追踪应用TV Time关闭，其创始人推出Bingers为粉丝打造新家园
zh.summary: TV Time的创始人正在推出Bingers，这是一款新应用，旨在替代关闭的电视追踪平台并保留其用户社区。这款后续应用将允许用户导入他们的观看历史并继续讨论他们最喜欢的节目。此举旨在维持使TV Time在电视爱好者中受欢迎的社区和功能。

title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
summary: Anthropic is localizing Claude pricing for the Indian market, offering subscription plans denominated in Indian rupees. India represents Anthropic's second-largest market after the United States, making localization a strategic priority. The move aims to improve accessibility and remove currency conversion barriers for Indian users.
content: Claude users in India are starting to see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans.

zh.title: Anthropic开始为印度本地化Claude定价，这是继美国之后最大的市场
zh.summary: Anthropic正在为印度市场本地化Claude定价，提供以印度卢比计价的订阅计划。印度是Anthropic继美国之后第二大市场，使本地化成为战略重点。此举旨在改善可访问性并消除印度用户的货币兑换障碍。

title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
summary: AI security researchers are adopting "context bombing" techniques to defend against malicious prompt injections that could compromise AI systems. The defensive strategy involves deliberately flooding AI agents with misleading context to trigger safe shutdown behavior before harm occurs. The approach represents a novel defensive tactic in the evolving arms race of AI security vulnerabilities.
content: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.

zh.title: 如今，防御者也在拥抱提示注入防御
zh.summary: 人工智能安全研究人员正在采用"上下文轰炸"技术来防御可能危害人工智能系统的恶意提示注入。防御策略涉及故意向AI代理发送误导性上下文，以在伤害发生之前触发安全关闭行为。该方法代表了人工智能安全漏洞不断演变的军备竞赛中的一种新颖防御战术。

title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
summary: SpaceX has received clearance to resume Starship test flights following a booster failure in May. This will be the company's first test as a public entity, serving as a market test for its iterative "fly, fail, fix" development philosophy.
content: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.

zh.title: SpaceX在5月推进器失败后获准再次进行星舰飞行测试
zh.summary: SpaceX已获得许可在5月推进器失败后恢复星舰测试飞行。这将是该公司作为上市实体的首次测试，充当其迭代"飞行、失败、修复"开发理念的市场测试。

title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
summary: Waze is introducing new AI-powered features built on Google's Gemini assistant as part of Google's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products. The updates aim to strengthen Waze's competitive position against Apple Maps and other navigation rivals.
content: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.

zh.title: Waze推出新的AI驱动功能和定制更新
zh.summary: Waze正在推出基于谷歌Gemini助手的新AI驱动功能，这是谷歌在其产品中推广Gemini的更广泛计划的一部分。这些更新旨在加强Waze相对于Apple Maps和其他导航竞争对手的竞争优势。

title: LAPD lets contract with surveillance giant Flock expire, citing ‘serious concerns’ over civil liberties and privacy
summary: The Los Angeles Police Department has ended its contract with surveillance technology provider Flock citing civil liberties and privacy concerns. The decision represents a major blow to Flock, which counted LAPD as one of its largest government customers.
content: The LAPD, one of Flock's biggest government customers, is ending its contract with the company citing civil liberties concerns.

zh.title: 洛杉矶警察局因公民自由和隐私问题未与监视巨头Flock续约
zh.summary: 洛杉矶警察局以公民自由和隐私顾虑为由，终止了与监视技术提供商Flock的合同。该决定对Flock是一个重大打击，该公司曾将洛杉矶警察局列为其最大的政府客户之一。

title: Uber’s robotaxi lobbying effort puts it on a collision course with Waymo
summary: Uber and Waymo are engaged in an escalating lobbying battle in Washington, D.C. over competing visions for autonomous vehicle regulation and deployment. The conflict highlights the two companies' divergent strategies as they compete for robotaxi market leadership.
content: Washington, D.C. has become a battleground for Uber and Waymo's competing views.

zh.title: 优步的出租车游说努力与Waymo走向对立
zh.summary: 优步和Waymo在华盛顿特区进行了一场升级的游说之战，围绕自动驾驶汽车监管和部署的竞争愿景展开。这一冲突突出了两家公司在争夺机器人出租车市场领导地位时的不同战略。

title: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables
summary: WhatCable is a free Mac app that tests USB-C cables by analyzing data from Apple Silicon Macs to determine their speed and power capabilities. The tool provides a convenient and cost-free alternative to discontinued cable testing devices.
content:
WhatCable. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

Nearly three years ago, I showed you an awesome $8 cable tester that quickly tells you if your USB-C cable is likely fast, slow, powerful, or weak. Sadly, that gadget got discontinued, and I've never found anything as intuitive or inexpensive since. But if you've got a Mac with Apple Silicon chips, you can simply download an even more impressive tester for free. 
It's called WhatCable, and it works by reading the data your Mac already collects about attached USB devices, data that Apple doesn't normally pass along to you. Just click a little widget that lives in the menu bar atop your Mac, and you can see every USB-C cable and device attach …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这个免费的Mac应用程序揭示了你神秘USB-C电缆的真相
zh.summary: WhatCable是一个免费的Mac应用程序，通过分析Apple Silicon Mac的数据来测试USB-C电缆，以确定其速度和功率能力。该工具为已停产的电缆测试设备提供了便捷且免费的替代方案。

title: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
summary: The EU is considering sweeping restrictions on teens' social media access, including age limits and potential outright bans, requiring platforms to prove their services are not harmful before minors can use them. EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen indicated new legislation could be proposed within months, marking a major regulatory shift toward protecting young people from social media platforms.
content:
The European Union is weighing sweeping new restrictions on children's and teenagers' access to social media, including age limits, an outright ban, and phased access. Social media platforms could also be forced to prove their services are not harmful before young people are allowed to use them.
European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said the bloc's executive arm could propose new legislation within months, after reviewing recommendations from a panel of experts released today. "This is not about whether children can access social media. It is about when social media can access our children," von der Leyen said. 
The panel reco …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 欧洲即将对青少年的社交媒体使用进行限制
zh.summary: 欧盟正在考虑对青少年的社交媒体使用进行全面限制,包括年龄限制和潜在的全面禁令,要求平台在未成年人使用其服务前证明其服务无害。欧盟委员会主席乌苏拉·冯德莱恩表示,新立法可能在数月内提出,标志着在保护年轻人免受社交媒体平台影响方面迈出重大监管转变。

title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
summary: Google is integrating its Gemini AI assistant into Waze to enhance trip personalization through conversational voice commands for reporting traffic incidents and map updates. The update introduces new features like Destination Search, enabling drivers to find nearby locations using natural language requests while maintaining focus on driving.
content:
Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. 
Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, to allow drivers to use conversational voice commands to report traffic incidents and suggest map updates, like a road closure or outdated house number. In addition, Waze introduced Destination Search, enabling drivers to use (again) use conversation voice commands (e.g., "Find me a coffee shop that's open …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Waze 将推出多项新的人工智能功能
zh.summary: 谷歌正在将其Gemini AI助手集成到Waze中,以通过对话式语音命令报告交通事件和地图更新来增强行程个性化。该更新引入了目的地搜索等新功能,使驾驶员能够使用自然语言请求查找附近的位置,同时保持对驾驶的专注。
